ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the folder where you want to save the notes. The default value is the root folder of your vault.
ast.target: 选择您想要保存笔记的文件夹。默认值是您保险库的根文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn on if you want to use a template for the path where you want to save the notes.
ast.target: 如果您想使用模板来指定保存笔记的路径，请开启此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the path where you want to save the notes. You can use all keywords that are available in the template (like {{title}}, {{channelName}} etc) and make something like 'YouTube/{{channelName}}/{{title}}.md'.
ast.target: 选择您想要保存笔记的路径。您可以使用模板中所有可用的关键词（如 {{title}}、{{channelName}} 等），并创建类似 'YouTube/{{channelName}}/{{title}}.md' 的路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn on if you want to create the folders for the templates and attachments if they do not exist.
ast.target: 如果您想为模板和附件创建文件夹（如果它们不存在），请开启此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn on if you want to allow creation of the files those have similar files already existing in your vault.
ast.target: 如果您想允许创建与保险库中已存在的文件相似的文件，请开启此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Make the template that will be used to insert chapters. You can use the following variables: {{chapter}}.
ast.target: 创建用于插入章节的模板。您可以使用以下变量：{{chapter}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Make the template that will be used to insert hashtags. You can use the following variables: {{hashtag}}.
ast.target: 创建用于插入标签的模板。您可以使用以下变量：{{hashtag}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn on if you want to use a file with a template to create the note instead of textarea above.
ast.target: 如果您想使用模板文件来创建笔记，而不是使用上面的文本区域，请开启此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn on if you want to see the debug/error messages in the console. Helpful for troubleshooting and issue reporting.
ast.target: 如果您想在控制台中查看调试/错误信息，请开启此选项。有助于故障排除和问题报告。

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 输入您的 API 密钥

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please use a valid URL (should be at least 11 characters)
ast.target: 请使用有效的网址（至少需要 11 个字符）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Insert template with URL from your clipboard
ast.target: 插入带有剪贴板中网址的模板

ast.name: text
ast.source: It's a secret API key that you can get from
ast.target: 这是一个您可以在以下位置获取的私密 API 密钥：
